headline: Do You Believe in the Growth Prospects of Eaton Corporation (ETN)?
summary: Janus Henderson Investors, an investment management company, released its “Forty Fund” fourth-quarter 2025 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. U.S. shares increased following positive news about corporate earnings. Economic growth has remained relatively stable despite challenges such as a government shutdown, policy headwinds, and slower-than-expected employment growth. Excitement around artificial […]

headline: Ruger Appoints New Senior Vice President & Chief Financial Officer
summary: MAYODAN, N.C., March 27, 2026--Sturm, Ruger & Company, Inc. (NYSE: RGR) is proud to announce the appointment of Andrew Wieland as Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, following the planned transition of Tom Dineen.

headline: BMO Capital Initiates Coverage On Eaton Corp with Outperform Rating, Announces Price Target of $428
summary: BMO Capital  analyst Daniel DiCicco   initiates coverage on Eaton Corp (NYSE:ETN) with a Outperform rating and announces Price Target of $428.
